prompt: Below are 50 research-paper titles from Dan's reading list, drawn from the Linus knowledge corpus. Cluster them into EXACTLY 5 topical groups. Every title must be assigned to exactly one cluster (no duplicates, no omissions). For each cluster: (a) give it a short descriptive name of 3-7 words, and (b) list every title assigned to it as a Markdown bullet list under that heading. Return the result as Markdown structured as five sections, each starting with '## Cluster N: <name>' and followed by a bulleted list of the assigned titles. Do not add any preamble, summary table, methodology note, or trailing analysis. Just the five cluster sections, in order.
